survival_probability_720.description: The probability that the fax machine survives for 720 hours without failure, used to determine the constant failure rate λ.

t1.description: The time (in hours) at which the machine is known to be functioning (conditioning event T ≥ 720).

t2.description: The time (in hours) by which the probability of failure is to be computed (T ≤ 900).
